title: How Shall the Young Direct Their Way?

verses.text: O blessed LORD, teach me your law, your righteous judgements I declare; your testimonies make me glad, for they are wealth beyond compare. Upon your precepts and your ways my heart will meditate with awe; your word shall be my chief delight, and I will not forget your law.
